title: Implement attestation verification with GitHub high assurance and SSH moderate assurance
summary: Add issuer abstraction, attestation verification, explicit assurance levels, GitHub-backed device-flow bootstrap as the preferred high-assurance path, and SSH/GPG signing as a clearly labeled moderate-assurance fallback.

acceptance.label: GitHub-backed bootstrap attestations can mint a human root with high assurance provenance.
SSH/GPG-backed bootstrap attestations remain supported as moderate assurance and are surfaced honestly in provenance.
